loop1.title: Live Operations & Runtime
loop1.note: Showing Load Headroom (derived from active power); Time to Service and Readiness Score are omitted as they require fuel/battery data not measured by this electrical meter.

loop1.title: Runtime & Duty
loop1.note: Showing load factor as a proxy for run-hours and operational intensity — the meter does not log engine start counts or direct run-hours.

loop1.title: Energy & Reliability
loop1.note: Showing total active energy, apparent energy, and power factor — per-phase energy and MTBF/MTTR are not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing power energy metrics (active/apparent/reactive power, voltage deviation, current unbalance) — sag, swell, and neutral stress events are not measured by this meter.
